revision.text:

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ihakami- Shrine
| native_name = 石神山精神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ihakami- Shrine
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ihakami- Shrine'''|石神山精神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11658590|ltq=Q11658590|qid=Q11658590|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province}}
** Series ordinal: 16
** P155: {{ill|Q135039986|ltq=Q135039986|qid=Q135039986|1=Sukino Shrine (Q135039986)}}
** P156: {{ill|Kashima Amatarashiwake Shrine|lt=Kashima Amatarashiwake Shrine|ja|鹿島天足別神社|qid=Q20043641|1=Kashima Amatarashiwake Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q907389|ltq=Q907389|qid=Q907389|1=Mutsu Province}}
* {{ill|Kurokawa District, Miyagi|lt=Kurokawa district|ceb|Kurokawa-gun|en|Kurokawa District, Miyagi|fr|District de Kurokawa|id|Distrik Kurokawa, Miyagi|it|Distretto di Kurokawa|ja|黒川郡|ko|구로카와군|pl|Powiat Kurokawa|ru|Курокава (уезд)|uk|Повіт Курокава|zh_yue|黑川郡|zh|黑川郡|qid=Q1131782|1=Kurokawa District, Miyagi}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 182053
** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== name in kana (P1814) ==

* イハカミ-<ref>Engishiki Jinmyōchō</ref>

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Q20043188|ltq=Q20043188|qid=Q20043188|1=Iwakami Yamazumi Shrine}}
** P1352: {'amount': '+1', 'unit': '1'}
** P3831: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
